maneuvers.verbal_succinct_transition_instruction: Drive south. Then Enter Bersarinplatz and take the 2nd exit onto Petersburger Straße.
maneuvers.verbal_pre_transition_instruction: Drive south on Petersburger Straße, B 96a. Then Enter Bersarinplatz and take the 2nd exit onto Petersburger Straße.

maneuvers.instruction: Enter Bersarinplatz and take the 2nd exit onto Petersburger Straße/B 96a.
maneuvers.verbal_transition_alert_instruction: Enter Bersarinplatz and take the 2nd exit onto Petersburger Straße.
maneuvers.verbal_succinct_transition_instruction: Enter the roundabout and take the 2nd exit.
maneuvers.verbal_pre_transition_instruction: Enter Bersarinplatz and take the 2nd exit onto Petersburger Straße, B 96a.

maneuvers.instruction: Exit the roundabout onto Petersburger Straße/B 96a.
maneuvers.verbal_pre_transition_instruction: Exit the roundabout onto Petersburger Straße, B 96a.

maneuvers.instruction: Your destination is on the right.
